para_trans: GOVERNMENT ORDER NUMBER: ASB 1226 / P.No.27 / PRASH-1
Madam Cama Marg, Martyrdom Rajguru Chowk,
Regulation of transfers of Maharashtra Government employees and in the discharge of government duties.
As per Section 4 (4) and 4 (5) of the Prevention of Delay Act, 2005, the following Ministries have been notified:
An officer of the Secretary cadre is being transferred inter-departmentally for administrative reasons.
The posting is being done in the section shown in column-4 in front of his name: -
2. Smt. Vishakha Sachin Adhav, Under Secretary, Department of Social Justice and Special Assistance immediately
3. General Administration Department, Government Circular No. 25.08.2022
To issue transfer of charge certificate on discharge by the concerned officers, as mentioned in the
The Government Order is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
